data.text/markdown:
Key Findings

  • Total runs range from 8.57 (in 2022) to 9.65 (in 2019) — a 1.08-run spread across seasons.
  • Home win rate averages 0.534 (range 0.520–0.548) — declining in recent seasons.
  • Naive MAE (prior-season mean): 3.58 runs — any useful model must beat this.
